metadata.title: Healthcare Supply Map — US (comprehensive)
metadata.description: Canonical list of every US job board, publisher, and recruitment supply partner usable for healthcare roles. Merges Joveo's existing supply repository with a curated 'recommended' list across 15+ specialist healthcare verticals (nursing, physician, allied health, dental, mental health, pharma, travel/gig, home care, diversity, and generalist platforms). Built from a Claude-authored audit (2026-04-24).

priority_summary.meaning: Must-have. Either primary channel for the specialty, or fills a major gap in your current list.
Strong complementary coverage. Worth adding for volume and specialty depth.
Additional coverage. Good to have but lower priority than High/Medium.

partners.name: Health eCareers
partners.specialties: Physicians, nurses, allied health, executives, APPs
partners.notes: Multi-specialty. (You listed this 3x in your repo - de-duplicate.)

partners.name: Health Jobs / HealthJobs
partners.notes: Broad healthcare coverage. (You listed this 2x in your repo - de-duplicate.)

partners.name: Hospital Careers
partners.notes: Confirm exact URL. If you meant hospitalrecruiting.com that's a different platform - see Recommended section.

partners.name: NHCN (National Health Care Network)
partners.notes: Confirm exact partner - multiple entities use this name.

partners.name: NHSN
partners.notes: Confirm - could be healthcare publisher/affiliate network. CDC's NHSN is a surveillance program, not a job board.

partners.name: Minority Nurse
partners.notes: Largest diversity nursing board. (You listed this 2x in your repo - de-duplicate.)

partners.name: DEI (generic)
partners.notes: You listed 'DEI' generically - confirm which DEI partner this is.

partners.name: PracticeLink
partners.notes: #1 US physician board. 35K+ active jobs, 8K+ health systems. Must-have.
partners.why_it_matters: Widely considered #1 US physician board. 35K+ active jobs, 8K+ health systems. Must-have if you're running physician campaigns.

partners.name: PracticeMatch
partners.notes: Complements PracticeLink. Candidate matching + CRM. Enterprise-preferred.
partners.why_it_matters: Complements PracticeLink. Candidate matching, digital campaigns, CRM. Enterprise-preferred.

partners.why_it_matters: Largest medical professional network in US. Physician-only platform - can't replicate reach elsewhere.

partners.why_it_matters: Premium brand halo. Read by academic and hospital physicians nationally.

gap_analysis:
What you already cover well
• Nursing generalist: Nurse.com, NurseRecruiter, ANA, Incredible Health, Minority Nurse
• Physician select specialties: AAOS, AAPM&R, AAPA, AANA, JAMA, MDsearch
• Travel nursing: Vivian, The Gypsy Nurse, Wanderly
• Pharma: PharmiWeb, RXinsider, PharmaDEI
• Healthcare generalist: Health eCareers, Health Jobs, Hospital Careers, AbsolutelyHealthCare, NHCN
Biggest gaps to fill (priority order)
1. Physician generalist + locums — you have JAMA and MDsearch, but PracticeLink, PracticeMatch, Doximity, NEJM, DocCafe, LocumTenens, CompHealth are all missing and each is a primary channel.
2. Physician specialty societies — you have 4 (AAOS, AAPM&R, AAPA, AANA). Missing another 15+ including AAFP (family med), ACP (internal med), ACEP (ER), AAP (peds), ACOG (OB-GYN), ASA (anesthesia). These are the only reliable channels for specialty physician campaigns.
3. Nursing specialty societies — your nursing coverage is all generalist. Missing ENA (ER), AORN (OR), AACN (ICU), AWHONN (L&D/women's), ONS (oncology). Specialty RN campaigns need these.
4. Allied health — near-complete blank spot. PT/OT/SLP via APTA/AOTA/ASHA, imaging via ASRT, lab via ASCLS, respiratory via AARC, MAs via AAMA. Major exposure given your Outlier healthcare expansion.
5. Dental — completely missing. DentalPost (850K dental pros) and ADA CareerCenter are table stakes. Add Cloud Dentistry and TempMee for gig/temp staffing.
6. Mental / behavioral health — completely missing. PsychologyJobs, APA JobCentral, APA PsycCareers, NASW, BACB (for ABA). High-demand category right now.
7. Gig / PRN apps — ShiftMed, ShiftKey, CareRev, Clipboard Health. Fast-growing category; SNF/hospital clients increasingly ask for this.
8. Home care + SNF + hospice — myCNAjobs, Care.com, LeadingAge, AHCA/NCAL, NAHC. Especially important given nursing shortage and SNF staffing crisis.
9. Healthcare admin / IT / finance — ACHE, HIMSS, AHIMA, HFMA, MGMA, AAPC. Only way to reach non-clinical healthcare talent.
10. Diversity healthcare niches — you have Minority Nurse + PharmaDEI. Add NMA (Black physicians), NBNA (Black nurses), NAHN (Hispanic nurses), NHMA (Hispanic physicians). Broader DEI audience reach.
how_to_use:
Healthcare Supply Map - US (Existing + Recommended)
This file contains your complete US healthcare supply map in one view.
Column B (Status):
  • 'In Repo' - partners already in your supply repository (highlighted in light blue)
  • 'Recommended' - partners to consider adding
Column C (Priority, for Recommended only):
  • High (green) - primary channel for the specialty or fills a major gap; add these first
  • Medium (yellow) - strong complementary coverage
  • Standard (gray) - additional coverage, lower priority
Use the auto-filter in row 1 to slice by any column. Common filters:
  • Filter Status = 'Recommended' + Priority = 'High'  -->  your must-add shortlist
  • Filter Category = 'Dental'  -->  all dental options in one view
  • Filter Status = 'In Repo'  -->  clean deduplicated version of your current list
Notes on your existing list (cleanup items):
  • Health eCareers is listed 3 times in your repo - deduplicate to 1 entry
  • Minority Nurse is listed 2 times - deduplicate to 1 entry
  • PharmiWeb / PharmiWeb.jobs are the same partner - deduplicate to 1 entry
  • Health Jobs / HealthJobs are the same partner - deduplicate to 1 entry
  • 'DEI' (generic) and 'NHCN' and 'NHSN' need clarification - confirm exact partner names/URLs
Suggested next columns to add for internal ops:
  • Integration Type (XML feed / API / manual / not integrated)
  • Pricing Model (CPC / CPA / Slot / Flat / Free)
  • Publisher Contact Name / Email
  • Last Campaign Date
  • Performance (hires / cost-per-hire)
how_to_use_partners:
Healthcare Supply Partners - US (Comprehensive)
Scope: Every US job board and supply partner that can be used for healthcare job distribution,
including (a) healthcare-specific boards and (b) generalist boards that carry healthcare categories.
Sheet 1 (Master List): The full list. Use the auto-filter in row 1 to slice by Category or Type.
Sheet 2 (Category Summary): Live counts per category using COUNTIF against Master List.
Legend of Category groups:
  - General Job Board: Generalist boards that serve healthcare as one of many verticals (Indeed, LinkedIn, etc.)
  - Programmatic / Aggregator Partner: Ad networks / DSPs / exchanges (Appcast, Talroo, JobAdX, etc.)
  - Healthcare Generalist Board: Pure-play multi-specialty healthcare boards (Health eCareers, HospitalRecruiting, etc.)
  - Nursing Job Board: Nursing-specific (general and specialty)
  - Physician / APP Job Board: Physician, NP, PA boards - generalist and specialty society
  - Allied Health Job Board: PT, OT, SLP, radiology, lab, respiratory, EMS, dietetics, etc.
  - Dental Job Board: Dentistry - DDS, RDH, DA, DSOs
  - Mental Health Job Board: Psychology, psychiatry, social work, counseling, ABA
  - Pharmacy / Life Sciences: Pharmacy, pharma, biotech, clinical research
  - Travel / Gig / PRN: Travel nursing, per diem apps, PRN shift marketplaces
  - Home Care / Caregiver: CNA, HHA, home care, hospice, LTC/SNF
  - Diversity-Focused: Minority, veteran, disability, LGBTQ+ focused boards serving healthcare
  - Government / Public Sector: Federal, state, IHS, VA, USPHS
  - Association Career Center: Professional society career centers (cross-cutting)
  - Regional Healthcare: State medical societies and regional networks
  - Other / Emerging: Digital health, media career centers, moonlighting
Suggested next columns to add for Joveo internal use:
  - In Supply Repository? (Y/N)
  - Integration Type (XML feed / API / manual / not integrated)
  - Pricing Model (CPC / CPA / Slot / Flat / Free)
  - Healthcare Vertical Strength (1-5)
  - Publisher Contact Name / Email
  - Last Campaign Date
  - Notes on performance
Sources: Compiled from industry research - Betterteam, Indeed Employer Guide, FitSmallBusiness, IntelyCare,
Becker's Hospital Review, PracticeLink, Jackson Physician Search, Roosevelt Institute (gig nursing),
Breezy HR, SoftwareFinder, and publisher/association websites. Built on 24 Apr 2026.
